GET YOUR CV EARLY

Do not wait until final year. Record projects, volunteering, leadership, skills, certificates, and results while they are still fresh.

Build Proof

Turn skills into projects, small wins, and evidence you can show.

Apply Early

Use your CV to pursue internships, scholarships, competitions, and student roles.
